meaning: n.意志,决心,意向,遗嘱v.aux.将,愿意,必须
examples: You will be remunerated and so will your staff.
A fresh egg will sink and an old egg will float.
There will come a time when they will have to negotiate.
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
New tactical trading plays will evolve quickly, while longer term strategies will evolve more slowly.
